description: Date of tariff announcement or implementation (YYYY-MM-DD)
ISO code of the country imposing the tariff (USA, CHN, EU27, CAN, etc.)
ISO code of the country or region receiving the tariff (ALL = universal)
Economic sector targeted (All Goods, Steel, EVs, Semiconductors, Agriculture, etc.)
New tariff rate as a percentage of import value
Previous tariff rate before this announcement
Change in rate (tariff_rate_pct minus prev_rate_pct)
Action type: New Tariff, Escalation, Retaliation, Universal Baseline, Reduction, Export Control
Legal authority (Section 232, Section 301, IEEPA, MOFCOM Order, WTO Authorization)
Estimated annual bilateral trade volume affected (USD billions)
True if this action is a direct retaliation to a prior tariff
Official source of the announcement (USTR.gov, MOFCOM, EC, etc.)
Additional context and detail about the tariff action
Calendar year derived from date
Fiscal quarter label (e.g. 2025Q1)
Year-month period label (e.g. 2025-04)
Trading date (YYYY-MM-DD)
ISO 4217 currency code (CNY, EUR, CAD, MXN, etc.)
Country or region the currency belongs to
Exchange rate: units of this currency per 1 US Dollar
1-day percentage change in exchange rate
7-day percentage change in exchange rate
30-day percentage change in exchange rate
30-day simple moving average of the exchange rate
7-day rolling standard deviation of the rate (volatility measure)
True if a major tariff announcement occurred within ±3 calendar days
Trading date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Country of the stock exchange
Full descriptive name of the index (e.g. S&P 500 (USA))
Yahoo Finance ticker symbol for the index
Adjusted closing index level for the trading day
Percentage return from the prior close to this close
5-trading-day return percentage
20-day simple moving average of closing price
50-day simple moving average of closing price
20-day rolling standard deviation of daily returns
Performance index — 100 = 2018-01-01 baseline. Enables cross-country comparison spanning the full trade war
True if a major tariff event occurred within ±5 trading days
Trading date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Economic sector name (Technology, Automobiles, Agriculture, etc.)
Estimated tariff exposure: High / Medium / Low based on sector trade intensity
Sector ETF performance index — 100 = 2018-01-01. Shows relative performance across trade war eras
10-day rolling standard deviation of daily returns
Daily percentage return
5-trading-day percentage return
Observation month (first day of month, FRED convention)
Economic metric: CPI, PPI, PCE, Trade Balance, Import Price Index, Industrial Production, Consumer Sentiment
Subcategory of the metric (All Items, Commodities, Core, Manufacturing, etc.)
Index level or value for the metric in the observation period
Month-over-month percentage change
Year-over-year percentage change
Trade war era label: Pre-Trade War / Trade War 1.0 / Phase 1 + COVID / Trade War 2.0
True if observation is from April 2 2025 onward (Liberation Day)
Calendar year of the World Bank observation
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code
Full country name
World Bank indicator code (e.g. NE.EXP.GNFS.CD)
Human-readable indicator description
Indicator category: Trade / GDP / Inflation / Investment / Labor
Numeric value of the indicator for that country-year
Year-over-year percentage change in the indicator value
Qualitative era: Pre-Trade War (pre-2018) / Trade War 1.0 (2018-2020) / Recovery (2021-2024) / Trade War 2.0 (2025+)
